channel.title: Posts on Peter Educate's Sports Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Peter Educate's Sports Blog

item.title: Does quarterback talent affect their local fans' interest in the team?
item.description: Does quarterback talent solely affect their local fans’ interest in the team? Did you watch the Bills vs. Chiefs Divisional Round playoff game in January? It’s ok if you didn’t, more than [51 million] (https://www.sportsvideo.org/2022/01/28/ratings-roundup-chiefs-bills-instant-classic-becomes-most-watched-nfl-divisional-game-in-five-years-on-cbs/#:~:text=The%20audience%20for%20Bills%2DChiefs,viewers%20for%2049ers%2DCowboys) people might be able to clue you in. Yes you read that correctly, CBS hosted one of the biggest events in the last 5 years for a typical NFL playoff weekend. The game was a back and forth tug-of-war that left jaws on the floor as the Chiefs pulled away with a sudden death touchdown.

item.title: Jayhawks survive Chet Holmgren to win NCAA Championship
item.description: This is my cool blog post about the Jayhawks. library(tidyverse) ## ── Attaching packages ─────────────────────────────────────── tidyverse 1.3.1 ── ## ✓ ggplot2 3.3.5 ✓ purrr 0.3.4 ## ✓ tibble 3.1.6 ✓ dplyr 1.0.8 ## ✓ tidyr 1.2.0 ✓ stringr 1.4.0 ## ✓ readr 2.1.2 ✓ forcats 0.5.1 ## Warning: package 'tidyr' was built under R version 4.1.2 ## Warning: package 'readr' was built under R version 4.1.2 ## Warning: package 'dplyr' was built under R version 4.
